name: PT Jaya Konstruksi Manggala Pratama Tbk
summary: PT Jaya Konstruksi Manggala Pratama Tbk engages in the construction business in Indonesia. The company is also involved in precast concrete manufacturing, trading, mechanical electrical, contractor, gas and asphalt dealer, station LPG and bulk transportation, asphalt trading, mining, and vehicle chartering activities. In addition, it owns or leases real estate properties; and trades in materials and chemical goods. The company was founded in 1982 and is based in Jakarta, Indonesia. PT Jaya Konstruksi Manggala Pratama Tbk is a subsidiary of PT Pembangunan Jaya Ancol Tbk.
